lot_no: & River bank protective work along the left bank of Meghna river from km 140.367 to km 140.667 = 300 m in c/w "Protection work at the bank of Meghna river at Borokheri, Ludhuabazar and Kaderponditer hat areas in Ramgati and Kamal Nagar upazila under Lakshmipur District" Project in Upazila-Kamalnagar, Dist.-Lakshmipur under Lakshmipur O&M Division, BWDB, Lakshmipur during the year 2021-2022 (Package No.- Lak/W-15/Lot-1/2021-2022).
